tre_cime.comment: Absolutely breathtaking! The views of the three peaks are stunning from every angle. Well-maintained trail and perfect for intermediate hikers.
One of the best hikes I've ever done. The trail is well-marked and the scenery is simply incredible. Arrived early to avoid crowds - highly recommend!
Fantastic hike with amazing views. Can get quite crowded in summer, but still worth it. Bring plenty of water!

lago_braies.comment: Il lago più bello che abbia mai visto! Perfect for families and the water color is magical. Go early morning for the best light.
Easy trail with spectacular views. The turquoise water is even more beautiful in person. Parking fills up quickly - arrive before 8am!

sentiero_viel_del_pan.comment: Incredible historical trail with amazing views of Marmolada. The WWI history adds extra meaning to the hike.

alpe_siusi.comment: Europe's largest alpine meadow! Peaceful walk with stunning Dolomite views. Perfect for all fitness levels.
Breathtaking panorama and easy walk. Saw wildflowers everywhere. Great for families with children!
